regions.text: This is the earth. We are seeing it from the north. There is more land than water on this side of the earth.
This is the earth. We are seeing it from the south. There is more water than land on this side.
This is the moon. The moon goes round the earth in a month.
Do we ever see the other side of the moon? No. We see the same side of the moon at all times. Why?
